name: Party-Perfect Orange Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Can mandarin oranges, well drained (11 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour boiling water over gelatin and stir until blended and gelatin is dissolved.
2. Stir in orange sherbet, blending well until melted.
3. Add mandarin oranges and pour into ring mold. Place in refrigerator until set.
4. To serve, unmold on a bed of lettuce and fill the center with topping.
5. Topping: In a large bowl combine drained mandarin oranges and pineapple chunks with flaked coconut and marshmallows. Stir in sour cream until well blended. Chill before filling the center of the orange salad ring mold. Serves 6 to 8.
